chapter_title.en: Chapter on Reviving Barren Lands and Properties

text: 3882 - وَ - سَأَلَهُ عَبْدُ اَللَّهِ بْنُ سِنَانٍ : عَنِ اَلنُّزُولِ عَلَى أَهْلِ اَلْخَرَاجِ فَقَالَ "ثَلاَثَةُ أَيَّامٍ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3882 - Abdullah bin Sinan asked him about staying with the people who pay land tax (Ahl al-Kharaj).
Imam (as) said: "Three days."
